name: MoneyGram
description_short: Arlington, TX MoneyGram at 500 N Collins St offers check cashing and money transfer services with extended hours seven days a week.
description_long:
MoneyGram at 500 N Collins St in Arlington, TX provides convenient financial services for Arlington residents. The standalone location operates seven days a week, with extended hours from 7 AM to midnight Monday through Saturday, and 8 AM to midnight on Sunday. This central Arlington location is designed for quick, efficient service.

At this Arlington, TX location, MoneyGram offers check cashing, money transfers, and bill payment services. You can reach the Arlington branch at +1 817-460-7771 to confirm services or get specific information about current rates and options available.

For Arlington, TX residents needing quick cash or money transfers, MoneyGram provides an accessible option with extended evening and weekend availability. Bring a valid photo ID and any relevant documents for your transaction. The service is straightforward and designed for same-day processing.
pros: 36+ locations across Arlington, TX providing extensive geographic accessibility
Extended hours at multiple locations, including some open until 11:59 PM
Online and in-person service options allowing flexible transaction methods
Partnership with major retailers (CVS, Walmart, Ace Cash Express) creates convenient, established locations
Multi-service offering including money transfers, check cashing, money orders, and bill payment
Dual domestic and international money transfer capabilities
Location finder tool with searchable directory by address, city, state, or ZIP code
cons: Transaction fees are typically higher than traditional banks for money transfers
Service quality and availability dependent on partner retailers rather than direct company control
International transfer exchange rates generally less competitive than banks
Many partner locations have restricted hours (CVS locations often closed until 8:00 AM)
Limited financial products compared to full-service banking institutions
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked consumers needing convenient cash-based financial services
Immigrants and individuals sending money internationally to family members
Customers preferring in-person transactions at trusted retail locations
People needing after-hours money transfer access in evenings or weekends
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best for unbanked and underbanked consumers, particularly immigrants, who need accessible cash-based money transfer and financial services with convenient retail locations and extended hours. The main caveat is that MoneyGram charges higher fees than traditional banks and relies on third-party retailer partners, so service quality and hours vary by location—it's a convenience service rather than a primary financial institution.
services: Service at partner CVS pharmacy locations
meta_description: MoneyGram at 500 N Collins St, Arlington, TX. Fast check cashing and money transfers with extended hours seven days a week.
